cascade_issues.title: Power margin reduction
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding peak power consumption limits during imaging mode.

cascade_issues.title: Mass margin increase
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces total payload mass, increasing the mass margin but potentially affecting structural dynamics.

cascade_issues.title: Thermal margin impact
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel may affect thermal balance and stability, potentially impacting ΔT across orbital cycles.

missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to validate TMM with right solar panel removed
missing_tests.reason: To ensure thermal stability after removing the right solar panel

notes: The removal of the right solar panel requires additional thermal and power validation tests to ensure system stability.
